revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data United Arab Emirates/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data United Arab Emirates/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Arab_Emirates%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Arab_Emirates%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the seven [[emirates of the United Arab Emirates]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Abu Dhabi]] || {{flag|Abu Dhabi}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Ajman]] || {{flag|Ajman}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Dubai]] || {{flag|Dubai}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Fujairah]] || {{flag|Fujairah}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Ras al-Khaimah]] || {{flag|Ras al-Khaimah}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Sharjah]] || {{flag|Sharjah}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Umm al-Quwain]] || {{flag|Umm al-Quwain}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|United Arab Emirates]]
[[Category:Country data templates of the United Arab Emirates| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
